narrative:
Belmont County has 42,057 registered voters, with 61.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.4%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.5 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 32.2% of registrants. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -5.2% D−R vs +2.5% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
